entity.summary: Centralized cryptocurrency exchange focused on digital-asset markets, order-book trading, account deposits and withdrawals, market data, and public API access.
entity.notes: Current first-party site exposes active markets, account access, market statistics, and a public API. The official About page describes FreiExchange as a cryptocurrency exchange platform for trading digital coins with deposits, withdrawals, security controls, and ongoing market additions. Exact launch date is not asserted in this initial record.

evidence.title: FreiExchange official markets website
evidence.notes: Current first-party exchange website exposes active market pairs, 24-hour market statistics, login, registration, fees, coin status, and API links.

evidence.title: About FreiExchange
evidence.notes: First-party About page identifies FreiExchange as a cryptocurrency exchange platform and describes trading, deposits, withdrawals, account controls, and continuing platform development.

evidence.title: FreiExchange API Documentation
evidence.notes: Current first-party API documentation exposes ticker statistics and aggregated buy/sell order-book endpoints for enabled trading pairs.
